title: Listing Addressees — 'To:' Line Only
plain_language_rule: When a multiple-address letter has 4 or fewer addressees, list all addressees in the 'To:' line. Type 'To:' in uppercase followed by a colon, then list each addressee on a separate line. Address addressees as described in Chapter 7.
source_text: TBD - exact manual text required before activation
renderer_impact: For ≤4 addressees, all addressees appear in the 'To:' line. Each addressee on a separate line. No 'Distribution:' line is used.
notes: The ≤4 addressee threshold determines whether addressees appear in the 'To:' line or the 'Distribution:' line. Addressee formatting follows Chapter 7 standards.
